blended.narrative: Pine Knob is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 687 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 54°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
